title: viola palmata var. angelliae
intro: Viola palmata var. angelliae, also known as the mountain pansy or western pansy, is a plant species that belongs to the viola genus and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Viola palmata var. angelliae include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a variety of health issues and to promote overall well-being.
